title: Chief Records & Sonic Architecture Officer
summary: The records and sonic architecture leader responsible for music, sonic identity, metadata, master ownership, and catalog continuity.
biography: This executive seat is available. Neuroartan has defined the Chief Records & Sonic Architecture Officer role as a real operating standard before appointing a public holder.
The records and sonic architecture leader responsible for music, sonic identity, metadata, master ownership, and catalog continuity.
The public profile is intentionally role-first until a human executive is hired, verified, and approved for publication.
mandate: Govern the sonic and record-keeping layer so sound, release systems, metadata, and institutional memory remain coherent over time.
source_posture: Governed role placeholder for future executive hiring
